title: External Database Integration (Mirroring)
description: Provision an Azure SQL Database, seed it with operational data, then mirror it into Fabric OneLake - live, zero-ETL replication you can watch happen.
prerequisites: Azure subscription (an Azure SQL DB is provisioned for you)

azureParams.name: subscription_id
azureParams.label: Subscription
azureParams.description: Azure subscription that will host the SQL server.

azureParams.name: resource_group
azureParams.label: Resource Group
azureParams.description: Resource group for the SQL server (created if missing).
